title: Summer Break in Mallorca: Cala Ratjada & Tramuntana

slots.name: Flight to Palma de Mallorca
slots.description: Direct flight from Berlin (BER) to Palma (PMI). Typical duration 2h 45m.
slots.notes: Estimated cost for 2 adults. Check Eurowings or Ryanair for specific times.

slots.name: Car Rental Pickup & Drive to Cala Ratjada
slots.description: Pick up rental car at PMI airport for the 4-day trip. Drive to Cala Ratjada (approx. 1h 10m).
slots.notes: Ma-15 highway is the main route. No tolls.

slots.name: Hotel Check-in: Lago Garden Spa
slots.description: Check-in at Lago Garden Apart-Suites & Spa Hotel, a high-rated boutique hotel with a spa and relaxed atmosphere.

slots.name: Late Lunch in Cala Ratjada
slots.description: Relaxed lunch by the harbor.
slots.notes: Try local tapas or fresh seafood.

slots.name: Lounge by the Sea
slots.description: Relax by the sea or hotel pool. Walk along the promenade.

slots.name: Dinner at Es Coll d’Os
slots.description: High-quality local dining at Es Coll d’Os. Farm-to-table Mallorcan cuisine.

slots.name: Hidden Beaches: Cala Torta & Cala Mitjana
slots.description: Drive to Artà and then to the Cala Torta area. Hike to the secluded beaches of Cala Torta and Cala Mitjana.
slots.notes: Bring water and shade. Road is rough, parking may require a short walk.

slots.name: Afternoon Leisure / Capdepera Castle
slots.description: Return to Cala Ratjada for more lounging or a visit to the Capdepera Castle.

slots.name: Dinner at Sa Pleta by Marc Fosh
slots.description: Fine dining at Sa Pleta by Marc Fosh in Canyamel. Open-fire cooking and local seafood.
slots.location: Sa Pleta by Marc Fosh, Canyamel
slots.notes: Short drive or taxi from Cala Ratjada.

slots.name: Lunch in Artà
slots.description: Lunch in the historic town of Artà.
slots.notes: Explore the town's narrow streets after lunch.

slots.name: Lago Garden Spa (Night 2)
slots.description: Boutique hotel stay at Lago Garden.

slots.name: Drive to Tramuntana (Valldemossa)
slots.description: Drive from Cala Ratjada to Valldemossa. Added buffer for summer traffic.

slots.name: Light Hiking in Tramuntana
slots.description: Light hike on the initial section of the Cami de l'Arxiduc for panoramic views.

slots.name: Lunch at Ca's Patró March (Deià)
slots.description: Lunch at the famous Ca's Patró March overlooking the sea. Fresh seafood.

slots.name: Lago Garden Spa (Night 3)
slots.description: Boutique hotel stay at Lago Garden.

slots.name: Explore Deià / Valldemossa Villages
slots.description: Explore the picturesque village of Deià or Valldemossa. Relaxed pace.

slots.name: Return Drive to Cala Ratjada
slots.description: Drive back to Cala Ratjada. Added buffer for summer traffic.

slots.name: Dinner at Restaurante Los Arcos
slots.description: Traditional Balearic dinner at Restaurante Los Arcos. Known for excellent paella.

slots.name: Leisurely Morning in Cala Ratjada
slots.description: Final morning swim or stroll along the Cala Agulla beach. Relaxed breakfast.

slots.name: Drive to Airport & Car Return
slots.description: Drive back to PMI airport and return rental car.

slots.name: Flight to Berlin
slots.description: Direct flight from Palma (PMI) to Berlin (BER). Typical duration 2h 45m.
